programs.title: The Giver
programs.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programs.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programs.desc: A small-time rancher agrees to hold a captured outlaw who's awaiting a train to go to court in Yuma.

programs.title: Catch the Bullet
programs.desc: A U.S. Marshal rides off to rescue his son, kidnapped by an outlaw, but winds up in deadly Sioux territory.

programs.title: Hell on the Border
programs.desc: Bass Reeves tries to bring a deadly outlaw to justice and become the first black U.S. Marshal in the Wild West

programs.title: Hell Ride
programs.desc: Two rival bikers gangs, the Victors and the Six-Six-Six's, refuel their decades-old rivalry.

programs.title: Operation: Endgame
programs.desc: A battle ensues among groups of government spy teams in an underground facility after the boss is assassinated
